title: ✉️ Email
lead: When a customer sends an email directly to the Contact Us address, the service is automatically registered in Salesforce.

auto.title: Automatic Registration
auto.text: The received email automatically generates a case in the system.

step1.title: Case Opening
step1.text: The customer's email is received and a case is automatically created in Salesforce.

step2.title: SAC Screening
step2.text: The service goes through SAC Screening for classification and routing.

sac.title: SAC is responsible for:
sac.item1: Identifying and classifying the type of request
sac.item2: Routing to the responsible area when necessary
sac.item3: Responding to the customer when the solution is within SAC's scope

highlight.title: Benefit
highlight.text: This process ensures that all requests received by email are handled in a standardized way and tracked from start to finish.

q1.text: Question: What is the main advantage of the email service flow?
q1.feedback: Correct! E-mail service provides formal registration of interactions, and more structured and precise answers.
